_meta.description: Beyond Paradise verified ethical operator directory. Operators are graded on observable, documented criteria only. This is a future revenue stream ($29–499/yr B2B listing). Do NOT list unverified operators.

ethics_criteria.conservation_land: 350,000-acre private concession — prevents agricultural encroachment on critical wildlife corridor
ethics_criteria.anti_poaching: Grumeti Fund anti-poaching unit (canine + ranger programme), documented annual reports
ethics_criteria.community: Grumeti Fund community programme (schools, clinics, income for 50+ villages in buffer zone)
ethics_criteria.wildlife_impact: Zero vehicle caps enforced. Off-road driving in private concession — no wildlife habituation harm from crowding
ethics_criteria.environment: Solar power, water recycling documented in sustainability reports

operators.name: andBeyond Mnemba Island

ethics_criteria.conservation_land: Private island — limits tourist volume to 12 guests max, protects turtle nesting beaches
ethics_criteria.marine_conservation: Partnership with School for Field Studies, sea turtle monitoring, reef restoration
ethics_criteria.community: Documented Zanzibar community employment and training programme
ethics_criteria.wildlife_impact: Marine encounters guided, no motorised water sports within protected zones

operators.ethics_notes: Minor deduction: boat disturbance near turtle nesting beaches documented in some reports. Tim to verify current protocols on next visit.

operators.name: MBCA-Registered Dolphin Tour Operators (Menai Bay)
operators.ethics_notes: MBCA registers operators and sets guidelines but enforcement is inconsistent. Some operators comply; others allow crowding. Tim to document specific operator names and compliance on next Menai Bay observation.
verification_sources: Amir et al. 2016 PLOS ONE — documents operator variation

operators.name: Thanda Island

ethics_criteria.conservation_land: Private island with active turtle conservation programme since 2017
ethics_criteria.marine_conservation: Documented turtle nest protection, 5 species in surrounding waters
ethics_criteria.community: Not yet verified by Tim first-hand

operators.ethics_notes: Conservation programme is documented publicly. Tim has not visited — cannot assign Tim Score or full ethics grade until first-hand visit.

do_not_recommend.note: This list is intentionally empty at launch. Operators are only added to 'do not recommend' after Tim has direct evidence of ethics violations — not based on hearsay or online reviews.
